category_title: Student with Duchenne muscular dystrophy exhibiting escape-motivated and attention-seeking disruptive behaviors
scenario_title: Social exclusion during break time soccer game
minimal_context: Philip is in the school yard during break time while his classmates are playing soccer.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The bell just rang for break time. The other students are taking the ball to the school yard to play soccer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Intrudes on the classmates' game and annoys them) Hey, look at me!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Philip, please step back from their game.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to intrude on the game to seek attention) Give me the ball!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: They are playing their game right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Falls on the ground and cries, yelling at his classmates) You didn't invite me to play with you!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: The bell just rang for break time. The other students are taking the ball to the school yard to play soccer.

STUDENT: (Intrudes on the classmates' game and annoys them) Hey, look at me!

TUTOR: Philip, please step back from their game.

STUDENT: (Continues to intrude on the game to seek attention) Give me the ball!

TUTOR: They are playing their game right now.

STUDENT: (Falls on the ground and cries, yelling at his classmates) You didn't invite me to play with you!

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: The bell rings for break and Philip's classmates take a ball and run to the school yard to play soccer
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Philip falls on the ground yelling at his classmates for not inviting him to play with them and cries
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: does not permit Philip to engage in common activities with his classmates
related_quotes: Philip falls on the ground yelling at his classmates for not inviting him to play with them and cries

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: intrudes on their games and annoys them seeming to seek attention
behavior_patterns.internal_state: cannot initiate and keep social interaction with peers
